title: Automation moving subitem to parent lead
excerpt: Is there a way to automate movement of a subitem from one group to another group subitem? You are able to do this manually by checking the box next to a subitem and moving to parent lead, but I do not see an automation f…

posts.author: aramos (Angel)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to automate movement of a subitem from one group to another group subitem? You are able to do this manually by checking the box next to a subitem and moving to parent lead, but I do not see an automation for this.
